title: SnapHelper
description:
Enhances Minecraft screenshot messages
by adding interactive buttons such as Open, File, Copy, and Path.
body:
![change screenshot message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6120a2f881e937d16ed83c8cfc0ccab7a7b08fd.png)

SnapHelper is a Fabric client-side mod designed to enhance the Minecraft screenshot experience by improving the screenshot notification shown in the chat. Instead of displaying a simple confirmation message, this mod adds multiple interactive buttons that allow players to quickly access and manage their screenshots.

When a screenshot is taken, SnapHelper provides convenient buttons such as Open, File, Copy, and Path. These buttons allow users to open the image directly, open the screenshots folder in the system file explorer, copy the image or its file path to the clipboard, and perform related actions without leaving the game. This greatly reduces the need to manually navigate through folders after taking screenshots.

SnapHelper is especially useful for players who frequently take screenshots for building showcases, bug reports, content creation, or sharing images on social media. Since it is a client-side only mod, it does not require installation on servers and can be safely used in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments.
